markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content production processes and efficiency improvements across different pods.](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pods vary in their content generation approaches, with some using custom prompt libraries and others relying more on manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Getting approved content from clients is generally not a bottleneck; the focus is on streamlining internal processes](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Time tracking will be implemented to better understand variations in workflow and identify areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [There's a push to standardize and automate processes that are currently manual, with the goal of building them into Atlas pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)

## Topics

### Content Approval and Topic Generation

  - [Most pods have ample approved topics from clients](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Some clients (e.g., Metronome) require outline approval, which can slow the process](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Standard practice is to have 30-40 approved topics ready for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Content Generation Workflow

  - [Typical workflow: Run 5-8 topics through Atlas for article generation](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Output is exported to Google Docs in internal folders organized by week](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Post-processing involves using custom prompt libraries in Claude or manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Some pods are using Claude directly for generation, bypassing Atlas for quality reasons](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)

### Post-Processing and Quality Control

  - [Panzer's pod uses a custom prompt library (8-10 prompts) for each client to refine content](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - Other pods may use notes or guidelines but don't have formalized prompt libraries
  - [Directors personally review all content before client delivery](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Some pods integrate client call notes and feedback into artifacts for improved content alignment](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

### Efficiency Improvements and Standardization

  - [Goal is to prototype processes manually, then have engineering build them into Atlas pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Custom workflows (e.g., ingredient integration for Biologica) are being developed and standardized](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [There's a push to document and ticket custom processes for engineering implementation](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

### Time Management and Tracking

  - [Time tracking will be implemented, starting with spreadsheets and potentially moving to more detailed systems](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Some pods already have informal time tracking via Slack timestamps](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Begin implementing time tracking across all pods to identify inefficiencies](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Document and ticket custom processes for potential integration into Atlas pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Directors to review their pods' workflows and identify areas for standardization](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Andi to start shadowing pods, beginning with Elvis's pod next week](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Experiment with getting Jessalyn and Rachel ahead of publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/sPR8eh7gQDbgJCxYH7s-k3zq9Az1K1ja?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
